projects.title: PayPlus Payments API
projects.subtitle: REST API Reference
projects.description: Complete REST API reference for an enterprise payments platform. Covers OAuth 2.0 auth, ACH, RTP/FedNow, Fedwire, SWIFT, webhook events, error schemas, and rate limiting — Stripe-style developer experience with multi-language code samples.

projects.title: CaseForge AML API
projects.subtitle: AML / SAR REST API Reference
projects.description: Enterprise REST API reference for the CaseForge AML case management platform. Restructured from a 12,000-line OpenAPI spec — covers 25+ endpoints, session + CSRF auth, structured error schemas, rate limiting, and multi-language code samples in Python, JS, Java, and C#.

projects.title: VaultPay API Docs
projects.subtitle: Payment Processing API
projects.description: API reference documentation for VaultPay — a fictional fintech payment processor. Covers tokenization, card vaulting, payment initiation, refunds, and webhook notifications with endpoint-level auth and error documentation.

projects.title: PPT→MP4 Automation API
projects.subtitle: PowerPoint to Narrated Video
projects.description: FastAPI application that converts PowerPoint presentations into narrated MP4 videos using Azure Text-to-Speech and FFmpeg. REST API with async job queue, webhook callbacks, and a polished dark-mode web interface.

projects.title: PayPlus Admin Guide
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Administration
projects.description: End-to-end enterprise admin guide for the PayPlus platform. Covers installation, LDAP/SSO/SAML user management, payment rail connectors, workflow engine, OFAC/AML compliance settings, monitoring, and troubleshooting.

projects.title: CaseForge SDK Docs
projects.subtitle: Python + Node.js Client Library
projects.description: Official client library documentation for the CaseForge AML platform. Covers Python 3.9+ and Node.js 18+ SDKs with tab-switched code samples, quickstart, authentication, error handling, migration guide, and full changelog.

projects.title: NexaFlow SDK Docs
projects.subtitle: Workflow Automation SDK
projects.description: SDK documentation for NexaFlow — a workflow automation platform for Node.js 18+ and Python 3.10+. Covers client initialization, workflow creation, triggers, actions, error handling, retry policies, dead-letter queue, and execution logging.

projects.title: CaseForge Onboarding
projects.subtitle: Customer Implementation Guide
projects.description: Structured 12-week customer implementation guide for the CaseForge AML platform. Covers project kickoff, data migration (legacy SAR/case data), training, UAT, go-live readiness, and hypercare procedures.

projects.title: Developer Onboarding
projects.subtitle: Payments API — 5-Step Flow
projects.description: Interactive 5-step developer onboarding for the Payments API: account setup and key provisioning, SDK installation, first ACH API call with live response, webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, and production go-live checklist.

projects.title: FinTech Learning Academy
projects.subtitle: LMS-Style Course Catalog
projects.description: Multi-course learning platform covering payments fundamentals, ACH processing deep-dive, fraud detection, and compliance — with lesson progress tracking via localStorage, scenario-based quizzes, and printable completion certificates.

projects.title: Payments Developer Tutorials
projects.subtitle: 4-Part Integration Series
projects.description: Four Stripe-style developer tutorials: ACH transfer creation end-to-end, webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, sandbox testing with return code triggers, and zero-downtime API key rotation.

projects.title: Docs-as-Code Guide
projects.subtitle: End-to-End Workflow Portal
projects.description: Comprehensive documentation guide covering the full Docs-as-Code workflow — Markdown authoring, Git version control, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Vale style linting, and multi-format publishing to HTML, PDF, and OpenAPI.

projects.title: BSA / AML Compliance Training
projects.subtitle: Regulatory Training Program
projects.description: Structured employee compliance training with role-based learning paths for compliance officers, operations staff, and developers. Four modules: AML fundamentals, BSA obligations, OFAC sanctions screening, and SAR filing — with a 20-question certification knowledge check.

projects.title: US Payments Hub
projects.subtitle: Operations & Compliance Reference
projects.description: Operations reference covering all six US payment rails: ACH, Fedwire (ISO 20022 migration), RTP, FedNow, SWIFT correspondent banking, and Card Networks. Includes 12 end-to-end scenario walkthroughs and compliance decision guides.

projects.title: US ACH Processing Docs
projects.subtitle: NACHA Deep Dive
projects.description: Detailed technical Markdown documentation for US ACH payment processing. Covers transaction lifecycle, all NACHA SEC codes, return codes R01–R29, NOC handling, same-day ACH, and NACHA 2026 rule compliance — with Mermaid flow diagrams.

projects.title: DocCraft Help Center
projects.subtitle: Self-Service Knowledge Base
projects.description: Full-featured help center for DocCraft AI: getting-started wizard, 20-item FAQ with search, troubleshooting guide, feature reference, workflow documentation, UI reference, and release notes from v1.0.0 through v1.4.0.

projects.title: NICE Actimize Platform Docs
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Structured Authoring
projects.description: Full MadCap Flare enterprise documentation for the NICE Actimize financial crime prevention platform. Covers Fraud IFM, AML, ActimizeWatch, Cloud, DataIQ, ERCM, and FMC modules — 20+ build targets including HTML5, PDF, and Word output.

projects.title: SunBridge Asset Atrium
projects.subtitle: Investment Platform Documentation
projects.description: Technical documentation site for an enterprise investment management platform (J2EE / Oracle RAC / SWIFT / Bloomberg). Covers system architecture, HA design, batch NAV processing, multi-timezone operations, failover, DB updates, and CAB release governance.

projects.title: Compliance & Regulatory Hub
projects.subtitle: Financial Crime Reference
projects.description: Internal compliance reference documentation for an enterprise investment platform. Covers UCITS, AIFMD, MiFID II, SEC pre/post-trade compliance, breach lifecycle management, regulatory reporting (Form PF, Solvency II, EMIR), and audit trail procedures.

projects.title: FraudShield AI Engine
projects.subtitle: Fraud Detection Platform Docs
projects.description: Enterprise documentation for a real-time fraud detection platform. Covers the ML risk scoring model, model input features, configuration, threshold tuning, false positive management, model retraining, AML integration, fraud typology reference, and audit/explainability.

projects.title: DocCraft AI
projects.subtitle: AI Documentation Generator
projects.description: Next.js 14 SaaS tool using GPT-4o to generate professional, MSTP-compliant documentation from raw source files. Features 5 doc templates, inline AI editing, Mermaid diagram generation, PDF/DOCX export, GitHub URL input, and document history.

projects.title: SpecFlow
projects.subtitle: OpenAPI → Developer Portal
projects.description: Next.js 15 tool that converts any OpenAPI 3.x spec into a polished interactive developer portal — live in the browser, no build step. Features a live Try-It console, schema visualization, multi-language code generation, full-text search, and compliance annotations.

projects.title: DocQuery
projects.subtitle: RAG Documentation Chatbot
projects.description: Python/FastAPI RAG chatbot that answers questions about any documentation site with clickable source citations and confidence scoring. Section-aware chunking preserves code blocks and tables. Embeddable chat widget for any static doc site.

projects.title: DocPulse
projects.subtitle: Documentation Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Documentation analytics platform with a FastAPI backend and Next.js dashboard. Tracks page views, search failures, content freshness, and coverage gaps across documentation sites. Generates weekly Markdown health reports automatically.

projects.title: Docs Content Strategy
projects.subtitle: Documentation Strategy Framework
projects.description: Comprehensive documentation strategy and information architecture framework — the Phase 7 capstone. Covers style guide, audience analysis, IA guidelines, DITA-based topic taxonomy, reusable templates (API ref, how-to, concept, release notes), audit checklists, and health scorecards.
